_description: Extraction template for Form 1065 (Partnership). Read this before processing any 1065 tax return. Key differences from 1120-S: guaranteed payments, partner allocations, short-year handling.

fields.tax_year: Calendar year or fiscal year dates — CHECK FOR SHORT YEAR
fields.line_10_guaranteed_payments: SDE-CRITICAL: partner guaranteed payments — always add back

validation: If short year: annualize revenue for comparison (actual_revenue * 12 / months_in_period)

schedule_k1.description: Partner's Share of Income — one per partner
schedule_k1.notes: For SDE: sum ALL partners' guaranteed payments + ordinary income. If there was a partner buyout mid-year, the guaranteed payments may reflect partial-year amounts for departing partner.

schedule_l.notes: Identical field structure to 1120-S Schedule L.

short_year_handling.description: Partnerships sometimes have short tax years (e.g., partner buyout triggers new tax period)
rules: Check dates on page 1 — if tax year is less than 12 months, this is a short year
Annualize: multiply reported figures by (12 / months_in_period) for trend comparison
Note ACTUAL figures separately from annualized for SDE — lender will want actual
Flag the short year prominently — it affects revenue trends and year-over-year comparisons

always_add_back: line_10_guaranteed_payments (ALL partners — this is the partnership equivalent of officer comp)
